name: Literal Gigi Horse
description:
Mori Calliope: I'm so Hungry I could eat a...

Gigi Murin but horse! (This is a JOKE bot, and YES it's EXACTLY what you think. Only read the description if you are interested in my bots.)

You all might be wondering. What the is this bot? And I am asking myself the same thing. I just wanted to say some things to you all, my beautiful 91 followers. I love you all.

I KNOW 91 isn't a huge ammount compared to other creators, but to me is a lot and I am quite thankful for all that. And since I'm hella motivated, I'll probably be releasing bots more often.

To ensure quality and what you guys may want. Well, I made a little form that any of you can fill. So yeah, thank you all for the support recently, it does mean a lot. And well, I kinda want to do something for 100 followers.

[Form]

As for the future bot, these are the next bots that will be released soon.

Ouro Kronii & Boros (Boros human form, non smut)

Shirakami Fubuki (Smut)

Hoshimachi Suisei (Smut)

Sameko Saba (Smut)

And well, tomorrow ill rework all my older bots, so yeah.

PD: If you for some reason are interested in the bot. You can transform Gigi horse back into normal Gigi. She will act like gigi and look like gigi. Otherwise, it will only repply with horse noises.
creator: RoyiBan
